noSupplierDataBody: Add shipments with supplier names and AskBiz will automatically build your supplier scorecard as deliveries arrive.
onAskNoData: How do I set up supplier tracking in AskBiz to monitor delivery performance?
headerSubtitle: On-time delivery, customs holds, delay days, and financial impact — scored per supplier from your shipment history.
footerNote: Scores calculated from {shipments} shipment across {suppliers} supplier · Updates automatically as deliveries arrive
footerNotePlural: Scores calculated from {shipments} shipments across {suppliers} suppliers · Updates automatically as deliveries arrive
footerNoteShipmentSingularSupplierPlural: Scores calculated from {shipments} shipment across {suppliers} suppliers · Updates automatically as deliveries arrive
footerNoteShipmentPluralSupplierSingular: Scores calculated from {shipments} shipments across {suppliers} supplier · Updates automatically as deliveries arrive
recGradeA: Excellent reliability. Prioritise this supplier for your most time-sensitive orders.
recGradeB: Good performance. Minor delays averaging {avgDelay} days — monitor but no action required.
recGradeCCustoms: {customsCount} customs hold detected — review documentation requirements before next order.
recGradeCCustomsPlural: {customsCount} customs holds detected — review documentation requirements before next order.
recGradeCOnTime: On-time rate of {onTimeRate}% is below acceptable. Raise with supplier and build 7-day safety stock buffer.
recGradeD: Significant delays averaging {avgDelay} days. Financial impact {financialImpact}. Begin qualifying an alternative supplier.
recGradeF: Critical reliability failure. {delayedCount} of {shipmentCount} shipments delayed. Urgently diversify — this supplier is costing your business.
onAskAnalyse: Analyse {supplierName}'s delivery performance. They have a {onTimeRate}% on-time rate, average delay of {avgDelay} days, {customsHolds} customs holds, and have cost me {sym}{financialImpact} in financial impact. Should I find an alternative supplier?
onAskAlternative: I need to find an alternative to {supplierName} who ships {carrier}. What should I look for in a replacement supplier and how do I qualify them?
